title: Crispy Pork Stir Fry
description: A quick and savory stir fry dish made with crispy pork and mixed vegetables. Perfect as a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high.
Add sliced ginger and minced garlic. Cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add pork belly and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Push pork to one side of the wok. Add more oil if necessary.
Add chopped bok choy to the empty side of the wok. Cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Stir in soy sauce and cured chili peppers.
Combine pork and bok choy. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
